title: Add Invoice — request form with saved contacts
what: The VCC's Add Deposit button is now Add Invoice: a full request form (deposit #, amount, send-to, CC, 35-character description) that emails the details to billing@unbridledmedia.com and records the request. Send To autofills from every client contact the platform has ever seen, and new name/email pairs are saved automatically for future invoices. Who to CC is a contact search with an + Add New option — each address becomes a removable pill. The billing email is a configurable automation (Invoice Request to Billing) in the admin Automations dashboard.
where: ProFi → open a project → VCC → Client Deposits → + Add Invoice
how: Open the project's VCC tab and click + Add Invoice in the Client Deposits tile.
Start typing in Send To — Name: pick a contact to autofill their email, or type a new name and email (saved for next time).
In Who to CC, search contacts and click to add, or type a new email and hit + Add New — addresses stack as pills with ✕ to remove.
Add the invoice description (35 characters max) and submit — billing@unbridledmedia.com gets the request email and the deposit line appears with the invoice number clickable to review.
Track every request in Reports → Client Invoice Report → Requests view.

title: Invoice Request to Billing — email automation
what: Submitting + Add Invoice in the VCC fires a branded request email to accounting with the deposit #, amount, the invoice's send-to and CC, the 35-character description, and who asked. It's now a managed automation in the admin Automations dashboard: the From and To addresses are editable (default billing@unbridledmedia.com) and the email design can be previewed. There is deliberately no CC field on the automation — the invoice's CC list travels inside the email body for accounting to use on the formal invoice.
where: Hub → Admin → Automations ▸ → Invoice Request to Billing
how: Open the Hub as an admin and click Admin, then Automations ▸.
Find Invoice Request to Billing in the list.
Edit From or To if the request should route somewhere else, and Save.
Click Preview to see exactly what accounting receives.
Every + Add Invoice submission from any project's VCC then emails that address automatically (once SMTP is connected).

title: Client Invoice Report
what: One report tracking every client invoice across live and closed projects. The By Close Month view groups projects under their close month (past months collapse once a project is closed and final-invoiced) and shows each deposit and the final invoice with Sent/Unsent status — the final invoice amount stays blank until it has actually been sent, and a Budget Owner column sits beside the project name. The Invoice Requests view lists every + Add Invoice request with deposit #, description, send-to and CC, amount, who requested it and when, and whether it has gone out.
how: Open Reports from the Hub and click Client Invoice Report.
Use the By Close Month / Invoice Requests toggle at the top right to switch views.
In By Close Month, pick the year, scan each month's table — status pill, code, name, budget owner, deposits with Sent/Unsent, final invoice (amount appears once sent), total budget, and close month.
Expand a past month's settled projects if you need the history.
Click any row to jump to that project in ProFi.
